description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the liuchong/rustup:nightly Docker image and caches the target/ directory. Define two stages, build and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs rustup target add x86_64-pc-windows-gnu, then apt update && apt install -y gcc-mingw-w64, then appends a Cargo configuration linking the Windows target to x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc, and finally executes cargo build --release --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu and cargo build --release --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu. In the deploy stage add a binaries job that depends on the build job, runs only for tags, moves the Linux binary with mv target/x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/ . && mv x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/{release/matrix-logger,} and moves the Windows binary with mv target/x86_64-pc-windows-gnu/ . && mv x86_64-pc-windows-gnu/{release/matrix-logger.exe,}, and publishes config.example.yaml, x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/matrix-logger, and x86_64-pc-windows-gnu/matrix-logger.exe as artifacts.
